label: lem:ext_deg_2
title: lem:ext_deg_2
statement: The field $R(i)$ is the unique quadratic extension of $R$.
proof: Let $K/R$ be a quadratic extension. Since $\ch R\neq2$, we have $K\cong R(\sqrt{a})$ for some $a\in R$. Since $a$ cannot be a square in $R$, we know $-a$ must be one. Rescaling by $\sqrt{-a}$, we get $R(\sqrt{a})\cong R(i)$.
